data.title: JPPI survey: Erosion of US Jewry’s support for Iran war | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: A recent survey by JPPI revealed that support for the Iran war among US Jews has dropped, with opposition increasing as operations continued.
data.keywords: Benjamin Netanyahu,Hezbollah,IDF,Iran,Lebanon,British Jewry,Gaza Strip,Diaspora,Donald Trump,survey,blockade,strait of hormuz,Israel-Hamas War,American Jews,Canadian Jewry,Operation Epic Fury,Operation Roaring Lion
